title: Ensuring Accountability in Agency Rulemaking Act
short_title: Ensuring Accountability in Agency Rulemaking Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Ensuring Accountability in Agency Rulemaking Act This bill requires, subject to a limited exception, that any agency rule promulgated under notice and comment procedures must be (1) initiated by a senior appointee (e.g., an individual who was appointed by the President or is a non-career member of the Senior Executive Service), and (2) issued and signed by an individual who was appointed by the President and confirmed by the Senate. The Office of Information and Regulatory Affairs must issue guidance for agencies to implement this requirement.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
